Union JCB Wellness Credit Card
Union JCB Wellness Credit Card
Apply Now
Union JCB Wellness card is premium card with annual benefits worth around Rs. 22,000/- per year on a variety of services. The card is designed to meet various needs by offering complimentary airport lounge access, complimentary golf game, various discounted programs, complimentary spa services, complimentary health check-ups and much more. Card can be linked on UPI for quick Scan and Pay merchant payments.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)
What are the interest rates applicable to Union Bank of India Credit Cards?
The interest rates applicable to Union Bank of India Credit Cards may vary
based on the type of card and the specific terms and conditions. Please refer
Terms & conditions tab on our website
https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in
or contact our customer service for detailed information on interest rates.
How to activate my credit card?
Send an SMS CARDACK W XXXX (where XXXX denotes last 4 digits of your credit card no.) from registered mobile no. to 7836884400 to activate your credit card.
How to generate new PIN for my credit card?
PIN can be generated for activated credit cards only. Generate PIN in any of
these 3 ways-
Credit card website – Visit GREEN PIN GENERATION tab on our website
(https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in)
Union Credit card app. - Log in Union Credit card app., visit PIN Generation
tab
Union Ease app - Log in Union Ease app., go to Credit card option under Transact
section, choose your credit card & go to Generate PIN option
Can I manage my credit card account online?
Yes, Union Bank of India provides a user-friendly online platform where you can easily manage your credit card account, view statements, make payments, and track transactions.
There are 3 modes to manage your credit card online:
Credit card website – Visit https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in (Login/Register)
Union Credit card app. (available on Google Playstore & Apple Store)
Union Ease app (available on Google Playstore & Apple Store)
What are the annual fees associated with Union Bank of India Credit Cards?
The annual fees for Union Bank of India Credit Cards may vary depending on card variant and the benefits associated with it. Please refer our website or contact our customer service for detailed information on annual fees.
How can I redeem my credit card rewards points?
You can choose from a variety of redemption options, including merchandise,
gift vouchers, travel experiences or credit card bill payment.
Redemption can be done in 2 ways-
1. Union Rewardz app. (available on Google Playstore & Apple Store)
2. Union Rewardz website
https://www.unionrewardz.com/user/login
Can I request an increase in my credit card limit?
Yes, you can request an increase in your credit card limit by visiting the nearest Union Bank of India branch. Your request will be subject to a review of your creditworthiness and financial profile.
Can I use my Union Bank of India Credit Card for international transactions?
Yes, Union Bank of India Credit Cards are accepted for international transactions. However, please ensure that your card is enabled for international usage and check the applicable foreign currency markup fee.
International/Domestic payment channels (POS/Online/Contactless) can be enabled/disabled using Union Credit card app., Union Ease app. & website login.
How can I report a lost or stolen credit card?
If your credit card is lost or stolen, please contact our customer service
immediately to report the incident. We will assist you in blocking the card
and arranging for a replacement. Card can be blocked in 4 more ways-
SMS - Send an SMS CARDLOST XXXX (where XXXX denotes last 4 digits of your
credit card no.) from registered mobile no. to 7836884400
Union Credit card app. - Log in Union Credit card app., go to Manage card
section to block your credit card
Union Ease app - Log in Union Ease app., go to Credit card option under Transact
section, choose your credit card (to block), block using Hot-list Credit
Card option
Credit card website - Log in website, Go to “Lost Card” under Request
section to block the card (choose Re-issue card option for issuance of
replacement card)
UV connect - Avail credit card services (block/unblock) on our official
Whatsapp no. 9666606060 from your registered mobile no.
How do I request replacement credit card after reporting my card as lost/stolen?
There are 3 ways to request replacement card:
Union Credit card app. - Log in Union Credit card app., go to Service
Request section and click on Request for Replacement of Card option
SMS - Send an SMSLOSTREPL<space>XXXX (where XXXX denotes last 4
digits of your credit card no.) from registered mobile no. to 7836884400
Credit card website - Log in website ( https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in ), replacement card should be requested at time of blocking the card. Under
Lost Card section, choose Yes in RE ISSUE CARD option.
Where will my replacement or renewed card be delivered?
Renewed/replacement credit card will be delivered to the registered address (in the records) at time of renewal/replacement request.
How to check my registered address in Credit card?
Union Credit card app. - Log in Union Credit card app., tap on hamburger
menu on top left, check User Profile under Account option. PRESENT
ADDRESS is address of communication.
Credit card website - Log in website ( https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in ), visit My Profile section to see Communication Address.
How to change my registered address for delivery of renewed/replaced card to updated address?
You can request the address update in your branch providing a copy of the address proof.
Address update can also be requested through your registered email id. Kindly send the scan copy of address proof with request for address update to
ccdhelpdesk[at]unionbankofindia[dot]bank[dot]in
What should I do if I notice an unauthorized transaction on my credit card statement?
If you notice any unauthorized transactions on your credit card statement, contact our customer service immediately to report the issue. We will initiate an investigation and take appropriate measures to resolve the matter. You can also block the credit card to prevent further misuse. After blocking the card, matter can be reported at ccdhelpdesk@unionbankofindia.bank.in
How can I pay my credit card dues?
Credit card dues can be paid in 4 ways:
Union Ease app - Log in Union Ease app., Go to Transact section, click on Credit Card
icon
UPI - Credit card Statement (delivered to registered e-mail ID) contains
QR Code & VPA (Virtual Payment Address). Pay your dues using UPI by
scanning QR code or input VPA to pay.
Net Banking – pay credit card bill using Union Bank of India internet
banking
Credit card app. – Login Credit card app., click on Payment icon. Proceed
to pay through Union Bank of India internet banking or Bill Desk
Credit card website – Visit website
https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in
. Go to CREDIT CARD PAYMENT tab for payment of credit card dues
Can I earn reward points on cash withdrawals using my credit card?
No, rewards points are not offered on cash withdrawal transactions done on your credit card

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)
What are the interest rates applicable to Union Bank of India Credit Cards?
The interest rates applicable to Union Bank of India Credit Cards may vary
based on the type of card and the specific terms and conditions. Please refer
Terms & conditions tab on our website
https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in or contact our customer service for detailed information on interest
rates.
How to activate my credit card?
Send an SMS CARDACKW XXXX (where XXXX denotes last 4 digits of your credit card no.) from registered mobile no. to 7836884400 to activate your credit card.
How to generate new PIN for my credit card?
PIN can be generated for activated credit cards only. Generate PIN in any of
these 3 ways-
Credit card website – Visit GREEN PIN GENERATION tab on our website ( https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in )
Union Credit card app. - Log in Union Credit card app., visit PIN
Generation tab
Union Ease app - Log in Union Ease app., go to Credit card option under Transact
section, choose your credit card & go to Generate PIN option
Can I manage my credit card account online?
Yes, Union Bank of India provides a user-friendly online platform where you can easily manage your credit card account, view statements, make payments, and track transactions.
There are 3 modes to manage your credit card online:
Credit card website – Visit https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in (Login/Register)
Union Credit card app. (available on Google Playstore & Apple Store)
Union Ease app (available on Google Playstore & Apple Store)
What are the annual fees associated with Union Bank of India Credit Cards?
The annual fees for Union Bank of India Credit Cards may vary depending on card variant and the benefits associated with it. Please refer our website or contact our customer service for detailed information on annual fees.
How can I redeem my credit card rewards points?
You can choose from a variety of redemption options, including merchandise,
gift vouchers, travel experiences or credit card bill payment.
Redemption can
be done in 2 ways-
Union Rewardz app. (available on Google Playstore & Apple Store)
Union Rewardz website
https://www.unionrewardz.com/user/login
Can I request an increase in my credit card limit?
Yes, you can request an increase in your credit card limit by visiting the nearest Union Bank of India branch. Your request will be subject to a review of your creditworthiness and financial profile.
Can I use my Union Bank of India Credit Card for international transactions?
Yes, Union Bank of India Credit Cards are accepted for international
transactions. However, please ensure that your card is enabled for
international usage and check the applicable foreign currency markup fee.
International/Domestic payment channels (POS/Online/Contactless) can be
enabled/disabled using Union Credit card app., Union Ease app. & website login.
How can I report a lost or stolen credit card?
If your credit card is lost or stolen, please contact our customer service
immediately to report the incident. We will assist you in blocking the card
and arranging for a replacement. Card can be blocked in 4 more ways-
SMS - Send an SMS CARDLOST XXXX (where XXXX denotes last 4 digits of your
credit card no.) from registered mobile no. to 7836884400
Union Credit card app. - Log in Union Credit card app., go to Manage card
section to block your credit card
Union Ease app - Log in Union Ease app., go to Credit card option under Transact
section, choose your credit card (to block), block using Hot-list Credit
Card option
Credit card website - Log in website, Go to “Lost Card” under Request
section to block the card (choose Re-issue card option for issuance of
replacement card)
UV connect - Avail credit card services (block/unblock) on our official
Whatsapp no. 9666606060 from your registered mobile no.
How do I request replacement credit card after reporting my card as lost/stolen?
There are 3 ways to request replacement card:
Union Credit card app. - Log in Union Credit card app., go to Service
Request section and click on Request for Replacement of Card option
SMS - Send an SMS LOSTREPL XXXX (where XXXX denotes last 4 digits of your credit card no.) from registered mobile no. to 7836884400
Credit card website - Log in website
(https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in/) replacement card should be requested at time of blocking the card. Under Lost Card section, choose Yes in RE ISSUE CARD option.
Where will my replacement or renewed card be delivered?
Renewed/replacement credit card will be delivered to the registered address (in the records) at time of renewal/replacement request.
How to check my registered address in Credit card?
Union Credit card app. - Log in Union Credit card app., tap on hamburger
menu on top left, check User Profile under Account option. PRESENT ADDRESS
is address of communication.
Credit card website - Log in website
(https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in/) visit My Profile section to see Communication Address.
How to change my registered address for delivery of renewed/replaced card to updated address?
You can request the address update in your branch providing a copy of the address proof.
Address update can also be requested through your registered email id. Kindly send the scan copy of address proof with request for address update to
ccdhelpdesk[at]unionbankofindia[dot]bank[dot]in
What should I do if I notice an unauthorized transaction on my credit card statement?
If you notice any unauthorized transactions on your credit card statement,
contact our customer service immediately to report the issue. We will initiate
an investigation and take appropriate measures to resolve the matter. You can
also block the credit card to prevent further misuse. After blocking the card,
matter can be reported at ccdhelpdesk@unionbankofindia.bank.in
How can I pay my credit card dues?
Credit card dues can be paid in 4 ways:
Union Ease app - Log in Union Ease app., Go to Transact section, click on Credit Card
icon
Net Banking – pay credit card bill using Union Bank of India internet
banking
Credit card app. – Login Credit card app., click on Payment icon. Proceed to
pay through Union Bank of India internet banking or Bill Desk
Credit card website – Visit website
(https://unioncards.unionbankofindia.bank.in) Go to CREDIT CARD PAYMENT tab for payment of credit card dues
Can I earn reward points on cash withdrawals using my credit card?
No, rewards points are not offered on cash withdrawal transactions done on your credit card

Union Unicorn Rupay credit card
Union Unicorn Rupay credit card
In view of the growing aspirations of customers and increasing demand for premium experiences, a new Credit Card variant on the RuPay network aimed at affluent and lifestyle-oriented customers.
This card is bundled with a comprehensive suite of benefits across high-engagement categories such as Travel, Food & Dining, Shopping, Entertainment, International Lounge Access, and a generous reward structure.

Overseas Emergency Cash Concierge

Insurance

Union Sparsh Credit Card
Union Sparsh Credit Card
Union Bank of India is committed to fostering financial inclusion and accessibility for all customer segments. As part of this commitment and our social responsibility initiatives, the Bank is pleased to announce the launch of “Union Sparsh Credit Card”, Accessible Credit Cards designed specifically for visually impaired customers, on RuPay Network.
These credit cards are developed with accessibility features to facilitate ease of use and independent financial management by visually challenged individuals.
Key Features of the Accessible Credit Card
Eligibility Criteria
Key Points
Implementation
Objective
Charges and features
MOST IMPORTANT TERMS AND CONDITIONS
Cardholder Agreement
Key Fact Statement (KFS)
Tactile Identification:
A rectangular notch (cut) will be provided on the opposite side of the chip to help visually impaired customers identify the card easily.
Braille Embossing:
The embossed letters “UBI” in Braille script will help identify the issuing bank.
Photo Option:
The card will have an option to include the photograph of the visually impaired customer for additional identification.

NEXTERIA Credit Card
NEXTERIA Credit Card
The credit card industry is evolving quickly, and customer expectations are rising. To stay competitive in the industry, we are introducing our first metal credit card, “NEXTERIA” that offers unique benefits and features, such as exclusive lounge access for family. This card is built on the “Ekaa” variant of the RuPay network.
The NEXTERIA Credit Card has been designed to meet the needs of premium clients, offering competitive features and benefits.
Benefits and Features
Rewards structure
Eligibility
MOST IMPORTANT TERMS AND CONDITIONS
Cardholder Agreement
Key Fact Statement (KFS)
A. RuPay Super Premium – Core offering
1. Unlimited Lounge with family (Bank Curated offer with NPCI)
Lounge Details
Two Family Visit allow per Quarter 1+3 & Unlimited visit for individuals (Domestic & International).
2. Hospitality Benefit
2+1 complimentary night
ITC (Premium Hotels other than Fortune). Throughout the year, any number of times except blackout dates as per the hotel.
1+1 Dinning (Set Menu)
Set Menu at Signature ITC restaurants (Peshawari / Avartana / Kebabs & Kurries / Royal Vega / Dum Pukht / Yi Jing / Pan Asian / Ottimo Cucina Italiana). Throughout the year, any number of times.
1+1 SPA
60 minutes SPA for resident customers of ITC (Premium Hotels other than Fortune), throughout the year, any number of times.
Premium Hotel Membership
Hotel Luxe membership which provides benefits across 15 international hotel chains (Hyatt, Marriott, IHG, Hilton, Accor, Shangri-La, AMAN, Cheval Blanc, Four Seasons, Rosewood, The Peninsula Hotels, Virtuoso, Mandarin Oriental, Small Luxury Hotel of the World, The Leading Hotels of the World).
The Elite Plus Membership Includes:
Complimentary Breakfast.
Complimentary Room upgrade.
Early check in.
Late check out.
Upto USD 200 in hotel dining & Spa Credits.
One time use of 1000 & 2000 hotel lux points (equivalent to USD 100 & USD 200).
Features mentioned in the point no. b, c & d are subject to availability.
3. Other Benefits
Movie Ticket
Buy 1 get 1 ticket up to ₹500/- once a month.
Comprehensive Insurance coverage
Personal Accidental Insurance: ₹50.00 Lakhs.
Air Accidental Insurance: ₹1.00 Cr.
Purchase Protection: ₹2.00 lakhs.
Travel Insurance of ₹0.20 lakhs (Baggage Loss).
Cyber Security Insurance of Rs.2.00 Lacs (from Bajaj Allianz, subject to annual review).
24 by 7 Concierge
Domestic: Golf Reservations, Car Rentals, and travel reservation assistance, etc.
International: Lost passport & lost luggage assistance, Embassy & hospital assistance etc.
Emergency Cash Concierge
International: In case of loss of wallet, cash support of USD 600 anywhere in globe.
Golf
4 domestic complimentary golf lessons/rounds in a year (List is available in the RuPay Portal).
Visa application services
1 complimentary lounge Visit for two visitors (only for applicable Visa process) annually. This facility is not available for Business Visa.
15 % Discount on Fast track immigration.
15% discount on Visa concierge services.
B. Proposed RuPay Exclusive Benefits (May change from time to time)
Movie Screening
PVR Exclusive pre-screening once in a year - 8 cities. Date will be preannounced, on first come first service.
Concerts & Events
Early Access to Concerts & Events - NPCI shall publish calendar.
Amplified Access to General Access Zone/Lolla Comfort Zone/Rock n Rolla (VIP) Pit etc. & receive food, merch and cocktail coupons (Limited seats, available only on first come first serve basis).
Merchant Offers & Other Benefits
RuPay Merchant offers / benefits & Exclusive offers (Available on RuPay website).
Dining
Dining, exclusives with District (Zomato) or similar type of service provider.
RuPay Lounge
RuPay Delhi Exclusive Lounge (Available till run exclusively for RuPay).
